name: texaspoker
description: Multiplayer Texas Hold'em with React + Vite + Tailwind + WebSockets

scripts.build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npx playwright install chromium
